Class DepthFirstGoalChooser

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.DefaultGoalChooser
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.DepthFirstGoalChooser
All Implemented Interfaces:
GoalChooser<@Nullable Proof, @Nullable Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
SymbolicExecutionGoalChooser
public class DepthFirstGoalChooser extends DefaultGoalChooser
Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied. The class provides methods for removing a goal, and for updating the internal data structures after a rule has been applied.
